body: 18 orders/day of Weekday Lunch Thali is a great start, Suresh. For the corporate-bulk version, I've drafted a package: 'Mylari Corporate Thali' @ ₹120 per person, min 10 pax. Want me to add it to your offers?
rationale: The merchant's last message showed interest in a corporate-bulk version of their thali, driving this follow-up message

body: 4-week kids yoga program, 3 classes/week, age 7-12, ₹2,499 - want me to draft the GBP post + Insta carousel?
rationale: The merchant's last message expressed intent to plan a kids yoga program, driving this response to help with program details and marketing materials.

body: Hi Aditya, you have an appointment tomorrow at Karim's Salon. Please arrive 15 minutes prior for a smooth check-in. Looking forward to serving you!

body: Riya, your appointment is tomorrow. Please arrive 15 minutes prior for a smooth experience.
rationale: The appointment_tomorrow trigger drove this message to remind the customer of their upcoming appointment.

body: 40% increase in ORS demand expected this summer. Want to move ORS sachets to counter visibility?
rationale: The trigger kind 'category_seasonal' drove this message to inform the merchant about the summer demand shift.

body: 2 credits available: IDA Delhi's 'Digital impressions — 2026 state of the art' webinar on May 2, 19:00. Dr. R. Mehta will cover Primescan 2, Trios 5, and CAD/CAM workflow ROI. Free for IDA members, ₹500 for non-members. Want to attend?
rationale: The trigger kind 'cde_opportunity' drove this message as it informs the merchant about an upcoming continuing dental education webinar relevant to their practice.

body: 28 April 2026 ko aapke metformin, atorvastatin aur telmisartan ki stock khatam ho jayegi. Ramesh, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy se aapki refill kiya ja sakta hai. Kya aapko abhi delivery chahiye?
rationale: The trigger kind 'chronic_refill_due' drove this message because the customer's medication stock is about to run out on 28 April 2026.

body: 28 days post-expiry, Dr. Sameer, your Bright Smile Dental subscription is due for renewal. You had 4792 views and 55 calls in the last 30 days. Want to renew now?
rationale: The merchant's subscription has expired 28 days ago, which is the primary driver for this message.

body: 18 new customers in 30 days is a good start, Dr. Meera, but Smile Studio's ₹199 dental cleaning offer 1.3 km away may attract price-sensitive patients. Want to adjust your ₹299 Dental Cleaning offer or add a new one?
rationale: The competitor_opened trigger kind drove this message as a new competitor, Smile Studio, has opened nearby with a similar offer at a lower price.

body: Hi Suresh, 18 orders/day of Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 is a great start. You're missing an opportunity to increase AOV by offering a sugar-free dessert option, which has seen a 52% YoY increase in searches. Want me to draft a promo for it?
rationale: The trend signal of a 52% YoY increase in 'sugar-free dessert' searches drove this message as a relevant opportunity for the merchant to increase AOV.

body: 4,980 views in the last 30 days — what service do you think is most in demand this week at Studio11 Family Salon?
rationale: The trigger kind 'curious_ask_due' drove this message to ask the merchant about the most in-demand service at their salon.

body: 18 orders/day of your Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 is a great start. Want to see how a corporate-bulk version could look?
rationale: The conversation history signal of the merchant's interest in a corporate-bulk version of their Weekday Lunch Thali drove this message

body: Hi Rashmi, you're missing your weekday evening workouts — we've got a new 7am yoga class, want to try it out with our 3 FREE Trial Classes?

body: 33 calls in the last 30 days is a good start, Dr. Asha. Consider our Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 offer to attract more patients like Reyansh who haven't visited in a while. Want to try it?

body: Hi Komal, 12 of your customers like Reyansh haven't visited in the last 30 days. Want to see who they are?

body: 38 days since we last spoke, Anjali — your salon's 30-day views are 1200, but down 12% from the previous week. Want to see which 3 salons in Aundh are getting the most views right now?

body: Hi Anand, 2189 views in the last 30 days is a good start, but I noticed your calls are down 21% in the last 7 days. Want to see which 3 nearby restaurants are getting the most calls this week?
rationale: The trigger kind 'dormant_with_vera' and the merchant's performance, specifically the 21% decrease in calls in the last 7 days, drove this message to re-engage the merchant and offer insights to improve their business.

body: 188 days left for Diwali. You're missing out on potential bookings if you don't promote your ₹99 Haircut offer now. Want to create a Diwali-themed offer?

body: 10 days to Eid-al-Fitr — want to see how Bend & Burn's '3 FREE Trial Classes' can attract new members?

body: 18% of your repeat-prescription customer count is up this month. You're missing potential sales without verified GBP. Verify now to increase views by 30% and improve customer trust.

body: 18% more covers on weeknight matches this season — today's match is DC vs MI. Want to see how your Match-night Combo @ ₹399 performs?

body: Your weekday thali is doing well — 18 orders/day avg. Want to see who else is ordering it? I've drafted a Google post highlighting your success story. Just say go to publish!

body: Hi Mukesh, milestone reached: 30% of your customers have ordered from you within the last 30 days. Want to see who? I've drafted a Google post highlighting this achievement - just say go!
rationale: milestone_reached signal drove this message as it indicates a significant customer engagement milestone for the merchant

body: Your calls have dropped by 50% in the last week compared to the same period last year. Worth reassessing your marketing strategy?

body: Your views dropped 12% this week compared to the metro average of 8% - let's discuss how to boost visibility for The Beauty Bar.
rationale: perf_dip signal drove this message as the merchant's views dropped 12% this week.

body: Your weekday 7-9pm slot has been at 90%+ capacity all month. Want to see who's booking in?

body: Your repeat-prescription customer count is up 18% this month, Vikas. Want to see who's buying more?

body: Priya, your 6-month cleaning is due on 2026-11-12. You have slots available on Wed 5 Nov, 6pm or Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Would you like to book one of these?
rationale: The recall_due trigger drove this message because Priya's 6-month cleaning is due soon.

body: Hi Diya, your last visit was on 2026-04-01. Your recall window is open for the next 2 weeks.
rationale: The recall_due trigger drove this message because Diya's last visit was 2 weeks ago, and the recall window is open.

body: DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15. Maximum dose per IOPA exposure drops from 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv. E-speed film passes at the new limit; D-speed does not. Digital RVG sensors unaffected. Audit your X-ray setup before Dec 15; document E-speed or RVG in your SOPs.
rationale: The regulation_change signal drove this message because the DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15.
